title: Minecraft Finally Perfected
description: A modpack with EVERYTHING that Minecraft SHOULD have done | Play the REAL Minecraft NOW!
body:
Heeeeelllo!! I have FINALLY made MC better. I mean properly. You see, other modpacks say there better minecraft and stuff, but if you play them, they are just boring and not very minecrafty. But look no further! Here it is. The PERFECT minecraft expirience. What if Mojang never sold to microsoft. THIS MODPACK is what they would have made the game into. From NEW WEAPONS to NEW MOBS SUCH AS BIRDS, this modpack has EVERYTHING minecraft needs to be... well... Minecraft!

All you have to do is nothing. Just enjoy minecraft, but the proper version, this version.

THANK YOU SOOOO MUCH just for looking at this modpack. It takes me a very long time to make these and I do it for your enjoyment. Even just 1 view means the WORLD to me! Its free to download, and EVEN MORE free to look at it. Thank you SOOOO much, it really means the world.

Apart from all that blabber, if you do download, please enjoy!
